ClassDescriptionId.description: The Id of the class/enrollment description. This can be found in GetClassDescriptions.

LocationId.description: The Location Id of the enrollment schedule.

StartDate.description: The start date of the enrollment schedule.

EndDate.description: The end date of the enrollment schedule.

StartTime.description: Enrollment start time (use null or omit for TBD).

EndTime.description: Enrollment end time (ignored if StartTime is null or omitted).

DaySunday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Sunday(s).

DayMonday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Monday(s).

DayTuesday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Tuesday(s).

DayWednesday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Wednesday(s).

DayThursday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Thursday(s).

DayFriday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Friday(s).

DaySaturday.description: If the enrollment occurs on Saturday(s).

StaffId.description: The staff member teaching the enrollment.

StaffPayRate.description: The staff pay rate. Must be between 1-21.

ResourceId.description: The room where the enrollment is taking place.

WebCapacity.description: How many people can signup online. Default: **0**

WaitlistCapacity.description: How many people can waitlist. Default:**0**

AllowOpenEnrollment.description: Allow clients to choose which sessions they’d like to sign up for. Default: **false**

AllowDateForwardEnrollment.description: Allow booking after the enrollment has started. Default: **false**

ShowToPublic.description: Allow clients to see this schedule Default: **true**
